title: Kleinstein-Lab/convbench pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

experiment.errorMessage: Experiment name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

airr.errorMessage: AIRR TSV file must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.tsv.gz'

embedding.errorMessage: Embedding TSV file must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension 'tsv.gz'
